_description: Quarter-end binary scoring of EOS™ Rocks™ (Wickman: done / not-done, no partial credit). Append-only — one entry per Rock per quarter. Drives the prior_quarter_rocks_score in quarterly_rebuild_log. First-quarter Rock-setters typically complete ~50% — Wickman explicit that this is calibration, not failure.

title: [Rock title — SMA-verified]
note: Example row — delete on first real Rock scoring.
